attributes.description: Overview of the CrowdStrike Host Logs.

params.markdown:
## Host inventory overview

This dashboard summarizes CrowdStrike host inventory from the `crowdstrike.host` data stream. Use it to monitor fleet size, host status, sensor versions, prevention policy coverage, reduced functionality mode, and hosts that have not been seen recently.

KPI metrics highlight missing total hosts and stale endpoints. Breakdowns show status, agent version, and policy compliance. The inventory table lists hosts with key fields for investigation.

attributes.title: [Logs CrowdStrike] Host
